title: Overtime Calculator (CLT)
meta_title: Overtime Calculator CLT 2026 | 50%, 100% & Night Shift - CalcForgeTools
meta_description: Calculate your CLT overtime pay: 50% weekday rate, 100% Sunday/holiday rate, and night shift bonus. Free and instant simulation with 2026 tables.

hero.title: Overtime Calculator (CLT)
hero.subtitle: Find out exactly how much each overtime hour is worth. Calculate 50%, 100% overtime and night shift bonus with precision.

formula: Overtime Value = (Salary ÷ Monthly Hours) × Premium (1.5x or 2x)
formula_explanation: The normal hourly rate is calculated by dividing the monthly salary by the monthly hours (weekly hours ÷ 6 × 30). Weekday overtime pays 50% extra, Sundays and holidays pay 100% extra. The night shift bonus is 20% on top of the normal hourly rate.
example: With a R$ 3,000 salary and 44h/week schedule, the normal hourly rate is R$ 13.64. Working 10 overtime hours at 50%, you earn R$ 204.55 in additional pay.

faq.question: How many overtime hours can I work per month?
faq.answer: The CLT limits overtime to 2 hours per day, totaling roughly 44 overtime hours per month. Exceptions exist for professions regulated by collective agreements.

faq.question: How much extra does Sunday overtime pay?
faq.answer: Overtime on Sundays and holidays pays 100% extra, meaning double the normal hourly rate. On weekdays, the minimum premium is 50%.

faq.question: What is the night shift bonus?
faq.answer: The night shift bonus is 20% on top of the normal hourly rate for work performed between 10pm and 5am. Additionally, each nocturnal hour counts as 52 minutes and 30 seconds.
